overview.short_summary: A private west coast retreat created to verify the villa workbook import workflow.
overview.hero_statement: A calm private villa with generous living spaces and long Caribbean views.

story.story_headline: Space, privacy, and effortless west coast living.
story.intro_paragraph_1: The villa brings together breezy interiors, shaded terraces, and a relaxed poolside setting.
story.intro_paragraph_2: Its layout works naturally for families and small groups.
story.expanded_paragraph_1: Living and dining spaces open directly to the terrace, keeping the garden and pool present throughout the day.
story.expanded_paragraph_2: Both bedrooms are designed as calm private suites with generous storage and air conditioning.
story.why_love_headline: An easy villa to settle into from the moment you arrive.
story.natalie_quote: A peaceful base for a Barbados escape.
story.natalie_paragraph_1: This is the kind of villa I recommend when guests value privacy, comfort, and an easy west coast location.

extras.contact_heading: Request availability and let us take care of the details.
extras.contact_text: Tell us your preferred dates and what matters most to you.
extras.pricing_helper: We can advise on the best dates, rates, and villa fit for your stay.
extras.tax_note: Rates exclude applicable Barbados taxes and service charges.
extras.security_deposit_note: A refundable security deposit may be required.
extras.booking_terms_1: A deposit is required to confirm the reservation.
extras.booking_terms_2: The remaining balance is due before arrival.
extras.location_description: Conveniently positioned for west coast beaches, restaurants, and shopping.

bedrooms.description: A quiet ground-floor suite with direct access to the garden terrace.
An elevated suite with a private balcony and broad sea views.

staff.description: Housekeeping is provided on selected days each week.

reviews.title: A wonderful stay
reviews.review: The villa was comfortable, peaceful, and beautifully located.

highlights.highlight: Easy access to west coast beaches
